title: V1.1 Issue Ticket Relationship Map
intro: For each v1.1 ticket: its same-screen/module siblings, hard dependencies (`-> #N`), and the PRD section behind it. v1.1 = everything except [v2.0-*]/[v3.0-*] titles and phase-6/phase-7 labels. Clusters and PRD anchors are curated in scripts/issue-map/clusters.json; ticket state + cross-refs are pulled live from GitHub.

clusters.name: Submit Offer screen (seller)
clusters.note: All trace to closed roots #297/#300 (seller on wrong screen + wrong route). Build #304/#302/#306 together (one form). #303/#305 are the messaging sub-thread.

clusters.name: Seller "Find Work" feed + categories
clusters.note: #301 scopes the feed to seller categories; #321 requires a subcategory on posts (pairs with #301). #318 milestone-counter bug ties to #77.

clusters.name: Discover / For-You feed (buyer)
clusters.note: Root #315 (closed). #321 (subcategory) is shared with the seller-feed cluster.

clusters.name: Image handling epic (#310)
clusters.note: #312 is the join point with Submit Offer (#304) and Discover (#322). #187 (R2 provisioning) is a hard blocker for #312 & #313.

clusters.name: Business accounts + verification (v2.2 spec)
clusters.note: Spikes define scope first: #235 -> #236 (backend gating) + #237 (mobile UI). Don't build #236/#237 before the #235 decision lands. Closed parent #211 -> {#225,#227,#229,#234,#242}.

clusters.name: Stripe / payments / onboarding
clusters.note: #84 (closed) stripe-degrade + payment-intent queue is the shared root. #154/#91/#149 are degrade follow-ups to #107. #77 milestone payment ties to #318.

clusters.name: Launch / tax & compliance strategy
clusters.note: #286 is the policy decision; #122 implements per-state 1099-K. Spec lives in standalone docs/tax-reporting-1099k.md (tax rules change yearly), not the PRD.

clusters.name: Phase-4 pre-launch hardening epic (#9)
clusters.note: #135 manual security review -> SEC tickets #255-#269 (mostly closed). #309 AI chat integrity + deploy controls.

clusters.name: Phase-5 soft-launch epic (#10) + ops provisioning (#40)
clusters.note: #40 ops runbook/on-call -> the vendor-provisioning chain (#85-#94). Open in chain: #86 status.sorcyn.com, #87 vendor audit, #93 Better Stack on-call.

clusters.name: Email templates / Sorcyn rebrand
clusters.note: #219 branded HTML email templates; #80 rebrand runtime surfaces; #69 docs brand update.

clusters.name: DB / migrations / dev-infra (v1.1 tech debt)
clusters.note: #215 v2.2 business-columns migration; #205 schema-DB drift detection; #194 backup secrets; #251 admin announcements + hide console.

clusters.name: Dev-infra & docs backlog (tech debt)
clusters.note: Non-screen tech-debt + docs chores (BL-* backlog, DX tooling). Low priority; pick up between feature work.

clusters.name: AI post-creation chatbot
clusters.note: #6 redesign AI post creation as chatbot UX — referenced by #74 and #309.
